summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chalet & Stay Configurator (iteration 19). All 26 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: 26 models load correctly, real product images from supplier websites (chaletskunert.nl, arcabo.nl, campsolutions.com, ucarecdn.com), category filter (Alles/Chalets/Glamping), supplier filter with Pleisureworld Partner badges (Award icons), 3 Inspiratie Pakketten, Samenstellen tab with 6 upgrade categories for chalets (Keuken, Badkamer, Terras, Interieur, Klimaat, Duurzaamheid) and 4 for glamping (Sanitair, Inrichting, Vlonder, Verlichting), dynamic pricing updates correctly when selecting upgrades.
passed_tests: GET /api/chalet/models returns 26 models
Models have real product images from supplier websites (not Unsplash)
Category filter 'chalet' returns 17 models
Category filter 'glamping' returns 9 models
Supplier filter 'kunert' returns Kunert Group models with chaletskunert.nl images
Supplier filter 'arcabo' returns Arcabo models with arcabo.nl images
Supplier filter 'campsolutions' returns Campsolutions glamping models with campsolutions.com images
Supplier filter 'bbs' returns BBS models with ucarecdn.com images
Model has complete pricing structure (basisprijs, BTW 21%, lease 60 months)
GET /api/chalet/suppliers returns 4 suppliers
All 4 suppliers have pleisureworld_partner: true
Supplier names: Kunert Group, Arcabo, BBS Systeembouw, Campsolutions
GET /api/chalet/inspiratie returns 3 packages
Inspiratie packages: Populair Glamping Pakket, Luxe Chaletpark Setup, Starter Park — Budget
GET /api/chalet/inspiratie/{pakket_id} returns enriched models and totals
GET /api/chalet/upgrade-options/chalet returns 6 categories (keuken, badkamer, terras, interieur, klimaat, duurzaamheid)
GET /api/chalet/upgrade-options/glamping returns 4 categories (sanitair, inrichting, vlonder, verlichting)
POST /api/chalet/calculate-with-upgrades with no upgrades returns base price only
POST /api/chalet/calculate-with-upgrades with upgrades correctly adds upgrade costs
Lease monthly increases with upgrades (€1,349 → €1,637 with €16,000 upgrades)
Frontend: Chalet Wizard loads with 26 models in sidebar
Frontend: Category filter works (Alles: 26, Chalets: 17, Glamping: 9)
Frontend: Supplier filter shows 5 buttons (Alle + 4 suppliers) with Award icons
Frontend: Main product image loads from real supplier website
Frontend: Style selection buttons present (Modern, Luxe, Landelijk)
Frontend: Inspiratie Pakketten mode shows 3 packages
Frontend: Package detail view shows enriched models with pricing
Frontend: Samenstellen tab shows 6 upgrade categories for chalets
Frontend: Samenstellen tab shows 4 upgrade categories for glamping
Frontend: Dynamic pricing updates when selecting upgrades (Upgrades line appears)
Frontend: Image carousel navigation works
Frontend: Back button returns to homepage with 4 flow cards
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is hardcoded in chalet_engine.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified real product images from supplier websites. Key findings: 1) 26 models total (17 chalets + 9 glamping). 2) 4 suppliers all with pleisureworld_partner: true (Kunert Group, Arcabo, BBS Systeembouw, Campsolutions). 3) Real product images from: chaletskunert.nl (Kunert), arcabo.nl (Arcabo), ucarecdn.com (BBS), campsolutions.com (Campsolutions). 4) 3 Inspiratie Pakketten: Populair Glamping Pakket (~€112k), Luxe Chaletpark Setup (~€1.12M), Starter Park Budget (~€480k). 5) Dynamic pricing works: selecting upgrades updates pricing panel in real-time. 6) Chalet upgrades: 6 categories (Keuken, Badkamer, Terras, Interieur, Klimaat, Duurzaamheid). 7) Glamping upgrades: 4 categories (Sanitair, Inrichting, Vlonder, Verlichting). 8) Dutch language UI throughout. 9) Brand colors: cream #FDF9ED, olive #244628, green #70C26C.
